sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-21'), 'Event A'), (2, toDateTime('2023-05-01'), 'Event B'), (3, toDateTime('2023-12-31'), 'Event C');
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) AS day_of_week FROM test_dates WHERE toDayOfWeek(event_date, 0) > 6;
SELECT id, event_date, CASE WHEN toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) = 5 THEN 'Friday' ELSE 'Not Friday' END AS day_description FROM test_dates;

SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(toDateTime('(2023-05-01 12:00:00)')) AS day_num, (toDayOfWeek(event_date, 0) = 0 ? 'Sunday' : 'Not Sunday') AS is_sunday FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IN (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id UInt32, category String, parent_id UInt32);

SELECT j1.id, j1.category, toDayOfWeek(now(), 1) AS day_num, (j1.parent_id IS NULL ? 'No Parent' : 'Has Parent') AS parent_check FROM test_joins j1 JOIN test_joins j2 ON j1.id = j2.parent_id WHERE toDayOfWeek(now(), 1) BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) AS week_day FROM test_dates GROUP BY toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) HAVING total_events > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) / 2;
CREATE TABLE test_nulls (id UInt32, event_date Nullable(DateTime), description Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_nulls VALUES (1, NULL, NULL), (2, toDateTime('2023-06-01'), 'Event D'), (3, toDateTime('2023-11-11'), 'Event E');
SELECT id, event_date, toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) AS day_num, (event_date IS NULL ? 'No Date' : 'Has Date') AS date_status FROM test_nulls WHERE toDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) IS NOT NULL;
